title: branch — published macros
description: No Blueprint schema macros. The three JSONB columns (address, coordinates, opening_hours) are added by ordinary `$table->jsonb()` calls in migrations; downstream modules that FK to Branch just use the standard `$table->foreignUlid('branch_id')` call — no branch-specific macro needed. Two runtime macros are published on `Illuminate\Http\Request` for `active-branch`-flavoured helpers on inbound requests.
namespace_note: Runtime macros extend `Illuminate\Http\Request`. Registered by `BranchServiceProvider::boot()` during framework boot.

macros.name: Request::activeBranch
macros.description: Returns the Branch resolved by `branch.resolve_active` middleware for this request. Convenience — same result as `active_branch()` global helper, but chains fluently on a Request instance. Null when no active branch resolved.

macros.name: Request::activeBranchId
macros.description: Fast path — returns the ULID without hydrating the Branch model. Used by controllers that just need to persist the branch_id on a new domain row.

registration_order: Registered during the standard boot phase. Depends on tenancy having booted first so the parent `BelongsToTenant` scope is already registered — tenancy priority (10) < branch priority (45), so ordering is safe by construction.
